name: Mouse Navigation

releases.author: Hobeom
releases.description:
## Mouse Navigation v1.1.0

This release introduces a safer upgrade path for the new gesture system.

### Highlights
- Added a **Gesture Engine** setting with two options:
  - `modern-v2`
  - `legacy-v1`
- Existing users upgrading from older versions default to **legacy-v1** to preserve behavior.
- New installs default to **modern-v2**.
- Added language support updates for the new setting (English/Korean).
- Included TypeScript and command API compatibility fixes for improved build stability.

### Notes
If you notice behavior differences after upgrading, open plugin settings and switch the Gesture Engine to **legacy-v1**.
releases.name: Mouse Navigation v1.1.0
